title: HUGE Relief for US Students!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Remember the $100,000 H-1B visa fee panic? Major relief for Indian students and techies already in the US! The US has clarified that this staggering fee DOES NOT apply to a "change of status." This means students on F-1 visas (including those on OPT) who are already in the country and applying for an H-1B are EXEMPT from the $100k charge. The fee is primarily aimed at new petitions for applicants outside the US.
